name: crush
description: Native Rust tool-output compressor. Subscribes to after_tool_call and returns HookResult::Replace with compressed output before it enters conversation history. Tool-aware columnar fold (ls/ps: constant-column factoring + per-column dictionary), JSON tabular fold, and a log-cleanup chain (ANSI/whitespace/run-collapse/blob-elide/path-fold). Versioned @crush/1 wire format, panic-firewalled, pass-through-safe. Replaces headroom-bridge.
author: Jawz

commands.name: crush
commands.description: Report how much context crush has saved this session.
